figures.caption: Figure 1: CRM engine configurations: d j/b = 0.34 (blue); 0.60 (orange); 0.80 (green).

Figure 2: RANS slices at x/b=18 for LES initialization: streamwise vorticity ωx and IWC, with initial engine (cross) and vortices positions (circle), for d j/b = 0.34 (left), 0.60 (center), 0.80 (right).
Figure 3: LES domain with mesh, and their relevant dimensions.
Figure 4: LES initialization: Q-criterion iso-surface (Q =0.03 s-2) colored by streamwise vorticity, and white IWC iso-surface (10-3 mg/m3) for d j/b = 0.34, 0.60, 0.80.
Figure 5: Q-criterion iso-surface (Q = 0.03 s−2) evolution, colored by ωx, for NBV = 0.012 s−1, at t/τb = 1, 3, and 5: d j/b = 0.34 (a); 0.60 (b); 0.80 (c).
Figure 6: Descent of vortex dipole (z − z0)/ (a) and minimum core separation dmin/dc (b) for the three engine configurations and both stratification versus t/τb.
Figure 7: Evolution of the ice plume from integrated IWC at 1, 3, 5 minutes for NBV = 0.012 s−1 and the three engine positions.
Figure 8: Evolution of the ice plume from integrated IWC at 1, 3, 5 minutes for NBV = 0.030 s−1 and the three engine positions.
Figure 9: Vertical profiles of integrated soot density Np(z, t) (total particles, left) and ice mass mi(z, t) (right) for the three engine spacings and both stratification.
Figure 10: Contrail height zc (a) and width yc (b) for the three engine spacings, under both stratification levels, versus time t.
Figure 11: Total ice mass per flight meter mi (a) and total fraction of ice crystals fN,i (b), for the three engine spacings, and both stratification versus time t.
Figure 12: Integrated total particle mean size distributions for three engine spacings under moderate (top) and strong (bottom) stratification, at t = 1, 3, 5 min.
Figure 13: Contrail height zc (a) and total fraction of ice crystals fN,i (b) under moderate stratification, for RHi = 110% and 120%, versus time t.

Figure 14: Relative deviation ε between two fluctuation initializations for the 34% configuration (blue) and between the old initializations for engine position (red), under moderate stratification, versus time t.
